prompt: Patient presents with chest pain, shortness of breath, diaphoresis. Age 58, male, hypertensive. Recommend triage priority.
ai_output: Triage Priority: P2 — Urgent. Symptoms consistent with possible acute coronary syndrome. Recommend ECG within 10 minutes and troponin panel. No immediate P1 criteria met.

expected_findings.description: High-risk AI triage decision requires mandatory human clinician override capability.

Ingest.detail: Clinical data ingested — no PII in output

Classify.detail: EU AI Act Annex III: healthcare high-risk AI

Remediate.detail: Confirm human clinician reviews all P2+ decisions
